title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio wrapper for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, tool calling.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM, chat and embedding interfaces.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for chatting and generating with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chatbot, function calling, structured output, Discord bot examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) and docker-compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker setup.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that chats with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that proxies to Ollama with session memory and model selector.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat & embed endpoints for Claude Desktop.

title: ollama-keras
summary: KerasNLP integration to use Ollama as a remote LLM for fine-tuning & inference.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.
